cause_analysis.narrative: Medical & Beauty Care Clinic churned on 2026-04-11 after 63 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 22-day silence starting 2026-03-09.
recommendations: [Audit] No single smoking gun. Worth a manual review to find non-obvious signals outside this data pipeline (Slack, account notes, AM memory).

messages.body: thanks
How can we do that

Very simple. I will enable the module. A feature gets added on the Zoca and you will have to complete the setup ( basically selecting payment rules/policies ).  To transfer your data ( customers and appointments ) from existing booking platform to Zoca you can send me a new export or share logins and my tech team will …

The sheet you had emailed me had contact names and numbers which is being used to send out Review invites.   For booking platform if you send me a file where you also have appointment data like on which date and time client is going to come to you then I can have those slots booked on the Zoca booking platform.

Shall I have the booking platform added to your account ?  Once onboarded people finding you on google will make bookings on Zoca and you will see them on Zoca and not on your current booking platform.
Would you integrate the calendar we use
Here are two screenshots showing how this will look for visitors. I’d also be happy to walk you through it live for better clarity.
Can you elaborate more on this

I filled out a test lead and went through the entire journey to understand the experience.  After submitting the lead form, I was redirected to the booking page, where I had to select a service, then move to the next page to choose an appointment, and finally enter my details to complete the booking.  Instead of this m…

Ruta, I noticed that you received 11 leads this month, which aligns with our expectations. However, all of them are currently marked as unresponsive.  To address this, I’d like to introduce a booking flow that will allow these visitors to complete the full cycle. This should help reduce drop offs and improve conversion…
Also when do you start sending the reviews for pts that come in
We did send cvv
Your existing appointments data along with clients can be imported to zoca
We sent it via email to you
Hi Ruta, I was reviewing your profile while planning the next steps, and I’d like to connect briefly. Would you be available for a quick call today?
Why keeps saying 1 pending lead if we answered?

I was trying to look to read the thing that you sent, so what are the numbers mean next to the words? These are what people are searching and that's how many people are searching. One second, let me share with that. So the screenshot which I sent you, that was the ranking which I just got from Google today. So basicall…

Hey Ruta, I wanted to quickly share an update on your keyword rankings as you’ll be completing your first month with us in 2 days. % Keywords with Improvement: 22.34% % Keywords in Top 3 Rankings: 2.13%  We’re seeing positive movement already, and I’d love to connect to discuss the strategy for the next month. Also, ju…
If you can now that would be great
Sure
Request Closed
